structure_flags.label: whole proposal
structure_flags.one_line: The file is still the raw Stage -1 skeleton: title, locked parameters, abstract, introduction, setup, assumptions, main results, sanity checks, proof sketch, scope flags, and iteration trail are TODO comments rather than proposal content.

structure_flags.label: Related work
structure_flags.one_line: Section 5 contains no published citations or one-sentence relevance commentary.

novelty_flags.label: Drafter checklist
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist item ChernozhukovFernandezValLuo2024 is misidentified: arXiv:2409.02311 is by Fernández-Val, Meier, van Vuuren, and Vella, not Chernozhukov-Fernández-Val-Luo.

novelty_flags.label: §8 comparator promises
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff promises comparator-matched results against AtheyImbens2006, CallawayLi2019, LiLin2024, and GoodmanBacon2021, but §8 contains no theorem or conjecture statements matching those comparators; tier=not-publishable below novelty_target=flagship until the promised frontier is actually written.

soundness_flags.label: Main results
soundness_flags.one_line: No Theorem or Conjecture statement appears in §8, so the promised m* threshold, CIC/CL plug-ins, assumptions, and target estimand are undefined in the proposal file.

soundness_flags.label: Assumptions/Main results
soundness_flags.one_line: The handoff lists Theorem 1, Conjectures 1-2, and Corollaries 1-3, but the proposal contains no assumption environments and no corresponding labelled results.

soundness_flags.label: Proof-sketch route
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 10 is only the template TODO and names no mathematical route, identity, or boundary computation.

soundness_flags.label: Honest scope flags
soundness_flags.one_line: The handoff contains Conjectures 1-2, but §11 is empty and does not distinguish open from proved content.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the skeleton with the actual v2 proposal text, including locked parameters, formal definitions of CIC and Callaway-Li plug-ins, the closed-form m* timing-moment threshold, and explicit Theorem/Conjecture environments.

Add location-level anchors for flagship comparators: Athey-Imbens Theorem 3.1, Callaway-Li Assumptions/Theorems 2.1-2.2, Li-Lin’s staggered extension and time-invariance caveat, and Goodman-Bacon’s weighted 2x2 decomposition.
Correct the distribution-regression DID citation to the actual arXiv:2409.02311 authors/title, or replace it with the intended Chernozhukov-Fernández-Val-Luo paper if a different citation was meant.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the .tex file with the actual proposal content; the current file cannot be novelty-reviewed beyond rejecting the empty skeleton as a patchable structural failure.
